intake.user_request: Fix 3 real test gaps introduced during WO-CODE-INTELLIGENCE-LEVERAGE-AUDIT-001: (1) clearScanCache/getScanCacheStats not exported from scanner public API, (2) absolute-path scan returning 0 elements, (3) call-edge detection accuracy regression from 95% to 43%

classification.plan_type_rationale: All 3 gaps are precisely scoped to known files with clear fixes. No discovery needed. Estimated 4-8 lines of code total.

in_scope: Export clearScanCache and getScanCacheStats from src/index.ts
Fix absolute path test (wrong path construction in scanner-standalone.test.ts line 189)
Fix non-existent dir test to expect rejection instead of empty array
Fix call-edge accuracy test to count individual calls within edges (not edge objects)
out_of_scope: chroma-store, pinecone-store, ollama-provider tests (cloud-service mocks — gate/skip, not regression fixes)
Any scanner behavior changes beyond the minimal export fix

constraints: Do not change scanner.ts logic — only add exports
Test fixes must match the actual scanner behavior, not change expectations arbitrarily
All 1525 previously-passing tests must still pass after fix

root_causes.gap_1_cache_api: clearScanCache and getScanCacheStats defined in src/scanner/scanner.ts but not re-exported from src/index.ts
root_causes.gap_2_absolute_path: Test constructs path join(process.cwd(), 'packages/core/__tests__/.test-fixtures') which assumes monorepo layout; actual fixture is at __tests__/.test-fixtures in cwd
root_causes.gap_3_nonexistent_dir: collectFiles() silently swallows ENOENT into empty array; test expects rejection
root_causes.gap_4_call_edge_accuracy: Test expects callEdges.length >= 7 (one per individual call site), but buildCallEdges deduplicates by (sourceFile, targetFile) pair; fix by counting calls within edges: callEdges.reduce((n,e) => n + e.metadata.calls.length, 0)
